tweet: shipped 9 prs. mostly plumbing and frontend speed runs (lazy-loading markdown, chunk splitting). fixed some streaming edge cases. also three new apps hit the showcase, including an ai city diorama generator and an mcp server. code is open.
alt_tweet: spent the morning splitting frontend chunks so the site loads faster and fixing image url parsing. spent the afternoon looking at a new mcp server and ai city dioramas someone built. 9 prs merged today.
image_prompt: Dynamic pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky CRT monitor robot looking excitedly at a tiny, glowing 8-bit city diorama sprouting from a circuit board. High contrast scroll-stopping energy. Lime green (#ecf874) and dark purple (#110518) palette with soft pastel gradients. The bee wears tiny safety goggles. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, warm lighting, chunky sprites, lo-fi retro gaming vibes.
reasoning: Leads directly with what shipped. Pairs tedious maintenance tasks (chunk splitting) with visually interesting community builds (dioramas) to show the duality of open source work. Lowercase, dry tone.
